---
title: Modelling and assessing trends in traffic-related emissions using a generalised additive modelling approach
date: '2007-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- S.D. Beevers
- J.E. Tate
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Modelling and assessing trends in traffic-related emissions using a generalised additive modelling approach

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, S.D. Beevers, J.E. Tate</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2007


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2007-d.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
